verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If love would project starting within His bride The reason for her tears would all subside If she attains that robe of white Dresses is all His grace The love of Christ would shine upon her face

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But my words could not explain Just why He bore out shame No phrase could quite convey the love he showed My song could never fill the hearts of a hundred thirsty souls But the spirit in God's words Could make them whole

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's the spirit, the holy spirit It's the spirit in God's words that make men whole It's the spirit, the holy spirit Why dont you let God's spirit fill your soul

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If words could describe Just how i feel inside I'd write a song concerning my dear Lord The words would be beyond Compare to any ever heard They'd glorify the one that i adore
